name: Brice Floor Lamp - FLL4061 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the sleek BRICE floor lamp, a perfect blend of elegance and functionality. Standing at 59.5 inches, this black iron lamp adds a modern touch to any room. Its minimalistic design complements both contemporary and classic decor styles, making it a versatile addition to your home. The sturdy iron construction ensures that it will be a reliable piece in your living space. Transform your reading nook or brighten your living area with a lamp that merges style with practicality. Choose BRICE to enhance your home?s ambiance effortlessly.
